Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}There was this one time I left some tissues in the pocket of my running pants.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And then I washed it without realizing. Oh, boy, did that make a mess![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Oh, can you hang on a sec while I put my shoes on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}It's the same stupid prank every time. Talk about unoriginal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a piece of gum on Yuko's locker...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}...Phew, at least my shoes are safe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Going that far would've been crossing the line.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}After the first few times, I stopped counting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I have my suspicions, but I don't plan to confront her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I was pissed off at first, but eventually I just got used to it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Getting worked up about this would just tire me out. It's not worth it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}...But if I catch her in the act, I'm fully prepared to grab her and teach her a lesson.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Uh, that was a joke, okay? I'm a nice girl! Really![n]{f 1 1}
